title: TransitStop
description: A single transit stop / station. One record per physical location per agency. A stop served by both MUNICIPAL_BUS and BRT produces TWO records (different stop_id, can be linked via interchange_group_id).

stop_id.description: Canonical ID: '{agency}-{native_code}'. e.g. 'brt-685', 'municipal_bus-1051', 'metro-blue-01'. Stable across runs.

name_alt.description: Alternate names from other sources (e.g. Transit Data, OSM) for fuzzy lookup.

coord_source.description: Which scraper produced the authoritative lat/lon. Null when coords are missing/invalid (record is still kept for name+route linkage).

coord_cross_check.description: Distance (meters) between this coord and the same stop's coord in other sources. Populated by the verification pass.

route_codes.description: All route_codes that serve this stop (denormalized for routing apps).

interchange_group_id.description: Stops within ~150m of each other across agencies share a group_id, enabling cross-agency transfers.

sources.description: Which scrapers contributed to this record. ['brt_api', 'osm', ...].
